title: SafeAFK
description: Guarantees safety during AFK sessions, by automatically pausing the game upon the player taking damage.
body:
SafeAFK is a simple mod designed to protect your Hardcore world from unexpected deaths during AFK sessions, by instantly pausing the game whenever you take damage.

Toggle the feature on and off with a custom keybind, and get a clear on-screen notification when protection is active. Only works on singleplayer worlds.
